description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a natural light wood finish. The upper section consists of three open shelves supported by side frames, providing ample space for displaying or storing items. The lower section features a cabinet with two doors, likely concealing additional storage space. The design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and no visible handles or decorative elements. The back of the unit is fully enclosed, while the sides of the shelving area are partially open. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A tall, light wood shelving unit with three open shelves above a two-door cabinet, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves above a two-door cabinet, with all storage areas visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and cabinet, and the open structure of the shelving supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully enclosed back panel, with no shelves or cabinet doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the open shelf supports and the cabinet's side panel.
